title: Irwin the Alligator Escaped Mark's Ark in Indiana. Again.
script: Irwin the gator is loose! Mark Kohlhorst runs Mark's Ark — an exotic animal show he takes to schools across Indiana. On June 9, he came home from a show, put his animals away, and noticed one cooler was empty. Irwin, his 2-foot alligator, was gone. Here's the thing: neighbors say this is the THIRD alligator to escape from the property. Not the first. Not the second. The third. Previous escapees from Mark's Ark include a pony, a tortoise, a pig, and an emu. The county is searching. Kohlhorst says Irwin is small and harmless — a 2-foot gator poses no danger. His neighbor says a 2-foot alligator could take your fingers off. Irwin is still at large. If a 2-foot alligator showed up in your yard, would you trust the owner's word?
